languages.text: {n}Куравич мрачнеет и вглядывается в ваше лицо.{/n} "Вы что, не знали? Иждриг приговорил ее к смерти за выходку с псайкером. Сам и казнил".

traits.locale_text: {n}Куравич мрачнеет и вглядывается в ваше лицо.{/n} "Вы что, не знали? Иждриг приговорил ее к смерти за выходку с псайкером. Сам и казнил".

languages.text: {n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."
languages.original_text: {n}Куравич мрачнеет и вглядывается в ваше лицо.{/n} "Вы что, не знали? Иждриг приговорил ее к смерти за выходку с псайкером. Сам и казнил".

{n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."

languages.text: {n}库拉维奇脸色一沉，仔细端详着你的脸。{/n}“您不知道？在灵能者那件事之后，伊兹德里格判了她死刑。他亲手执行的。”
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."

traits.locale_text: {n}库拉维奇脸色一沉，仔细端详着你的脸。{/n}“您不知道？在灵能者那件事之后，伊兹德里格判了她死刑。他亲手执行的。”

languages.text: {n}Kuravich'in ifadesi kararıyor ve yüzünü inceliyor.{/n} "Haberiniz yok mu? Ruhsezer hadisesinden sonra İzdrig onu ölüme mahkûm etti. Cezayı bizzat infaz etti."
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich'in ifadesi kararıyor ve yüzünü inceliyor.{/n} "Haberiniz yok mu? Ruhsezer hadisesinden sonra İzdrig onu ölüme mahkûm etti. Cezayı bizzat infaz etti."

languages.text: {n}Kuravich scrute votre visage, l'air sombre.{/n} « Vous n'êtes pas au courant ? Izdrig l'a condamnée à mort après l'incident du psyker. Il a exécuté la sentence lui-même. »
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich scrute votre visage, l'air sombre.{/n} « Vous n'êtes pas au courant ? Izdrig l'a condamnée à mort après l'incident du psyker. Il a exécuté la sentence lui-même. »

languages.text: {n}El rostro de Kuravich se ensombrece y estudia tu cara.{/n} «¿No lo sabía? Izdrig la condenó a muerte tras el incidente del psíquico. Ejecutó él mismo la sentencia».
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro de Kuravich se ensombrece y estudia tu cara.{/n} «¿No lo sabía? Izdrig la condenó a muerte tras el incidente del psíquico. Ejecutó él mismo la sentencia».

languages.text: {n}Kuravichs Miene verfinstert sich und er studiert dein Gesicht.{/n} "Das wisst Ihr nicht? Izdrig hat sie nach dem Zwischenfall mit diesem Psioniker zum Tode verurteilt. Hat das Urteil selbst vollstreckt."
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravichs Miene verfinstert sich und er studiert dein Gesicht.{/n} "Das wisst Ihr nicht? Izdrig hat sie nach dem Zwischenfall mit diesem Psioniker zum Tode verurteilt. Hat das Urteil selbst vollstreckt."

languages.text:
{n}クラビッチの表情が曇り、あなたの顔を見つめる。{/n}
「知らなかったの？イズドリーグはあのサイカー事件の後、彼女を死刑に処した。そして自ら執行したんだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich's expression darkens and he studies your face.{/n} "You didn't know? Izdrig sentenced her to death after that psyker incident. He carried out the sentence himself."
